breaking.title: Three dead after under-construction warehouse collapses at Taratala in Kolkata; rescue efforts on
breaking.summary: “All the agencies are working together. We have rescued 21 persons of which three have died,” said Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari at the accident site, adding 18 are still trapped and contact has been established with them

breaking.title: Brent crude falls 3%, drops below $75/bbl for first time since US-Iran war began
breaking.summary: Global oil prices tumbled as signs emerged of increased tanker activity in the Strait of Hormuz, potentially signaling Iran's return to the market. Analysts suggest this, coupled with eased hostilities and a U.S. sanctions waiver, is pressuring prices.  Despite encouraging signs, uncertainty lingers over the durability of U.S.-Iran nuclear talks, with some experts warning markets may be too optimistic.

breaking.title: Quote of the day by David Abrams: "There are good assets and bad assets but good prices and bad prices supersede whether the assets are good or bad"
breaking.summary: David Abrams stresses that investment outcomes depend more on entry price than asset quality. Even strong businesses can underperform if overvalued, while weaker ones can generate returns if bought cheaply. The insight reinforces core value investing principles of margin of safety, disciplined valuation, and avoiding momentum-driven buying.

breaking.title: France confirms Ebola virus in patient who worked in Congo
breaking.summary: The individual, who has not been identified, returned from a humanitarian mission in one of the virus transmission zones in Congo and was taken into care at a specialized facility in France

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Iran has told U.S. no tolls being sought at Strait of Hormuz, says Donald Trump
breaking.summary: Iran says deal to end West Asia war 'declaration of U.S. defeat'; Marco Rubio in UAE to ease concerns over tentative Iran deal; Iran's nuclear sites likely to be inspected

breaking.title: Expert panel set up to formulate SOP to govern entry of zoo staff into animal enclosures, Central Zoo Authority tells Karnataka High Court
breaking.summary: A petition in the High Court of Karnataka has listed 17 incidents in zoological parks across the country in the last decade, including seven animal attacks in Karnataka

breaking.title: Thanking family from ‘Kampala to Delhi’, Zohran Mamdani vows to govern ‘expansively, audaciously’ in inaugural speech as NYC Mayor
breaking.summary: Mamdani inherits a city on the upswing, after years of slow recovery from the COVID-19 pandemic

breaking.title: India, U.S. note ‘substantial progress’ on trade deal talks as U.S. Trade Representative Greer ends two-day visit to Delhi
breaking.summary: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer held multiple meetings with Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal; however, the two sides have not yet been able to announce a deadline by which the trade deals will be finalised
